threats.title: Lotus Wiper Malware Targets Venezuelan Energy Systems in Destructive Attack
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a previously undocumented data wiper that has been used in attacks targeting Venezuela at the end of last year and the start of 2026. Dubbed Lotus Wiper, the novel file wiper has been used in a destructive campaign targeting the energy and utilities sector in Venezuela, per findings from Kaspersky. threats.title: Toxic Combinations: When Cross-App Permissions Stack into Risk
threats.summary: On January 31, 2026, researchers disclosed that Moltbook, a social network built for AI agents, had left its database wide open, exposing 35,000 email addresses and 1.5 million agent API tokens across 770,000 active agents. threats.title: Microsoft Patches Critical ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 Privilege Escalation Bug
threats.summary: Microsoft has released out-of-band updates to address a security vulnerability in ASP.NET Core that could allow an attacker to escalate privileges. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-40372, carries a CVSS score of 9.1 out of 10.0. It's rated Important in severity. threats.title: Cohere AI Terrarium Sandbox Flaw Enables Root Code Execution, Container Escape
threats.summary: A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution.
